contactUs.imageAlt.message: Image with a hand clicking on some

contactUs.intro.line1.message: Do you have questions about Tella?

contactUs.intro.line2.message: Do you need support or training to deploy it in your community?

contactUs.intro.line3.message: Do you have ideas to improve the app?

contactUs.getInTouch.feedback.message: Use the anonymous feedback form in the Tella Settings.

contactUs.closing.message: We are looking forward to hearing from you!

homepage.intro.message: In challenging environments, with limited or no internet connectivity or in the face of repression, Tella makes it easier and safer to collect, protect and hide sensitive data.

homepage.screenshotAlt.message: Screenshot of the Tella app on Android. Showing Connections to Tella Web Uwazi and the folder structure showing that within Tella users can record and save Images, Videos and Audios securely and encripted.

homepage.whyTella.intro.message: If you are an activist, journalist, human rights defender, or anyone who documents injustice, you can use Tella to:

homepage.protectData.title.description: The leading '1.' is part of the translatable text.

homepage.collectEvidence.title.message: 2. Collect evidence of human rights violations
homepage.collectEvidence.title.description: The leading '2.' is part of the translatable text.

homepage.collectEvidence.item3b.linkText.message: fully offline feature to transfer files to nearby devices

homepage.collectEvidence.cta.message: Read how organizations are using Tella

homepage.openSource.title.message: 3. Tella is free, multilingual, and open-source
homepage.openSource.title.description: The leading '3.' is part of the translatable text.

homepage.openSource.item2.linkText.description: Refers to language availability, not stock/inventory availability.

homepage.protectData.item2.emphasis.message: Hide your files in the device:

homepage.protectData.item5.emphasis.description: Newest bullet, not yet translated in most locales.

homepage.whyTella.item1.rest.message: from physical and digital repression while collecting and storing sensitive information.

homepage.whyTella.item2.rest.message: from censorship, tampering, interception, and destruction.

homepage.whyTella.item3.rest.message: that can be used for research, advocacy, or transitional justice.

homepage.protectData.item1.rest.message: Tella automatically encrypts your photos, videos, and audio recordings as soon as they are captured.

homepage.protectData.item2.rest.message: your files are inaccessible from the phone's regular gallery or file explorer. You can only access them in the app.

homepage.protectData.item3.rest.message: set a PIN or password to protect your files. Entering the correct lock is the only way to decrypt the files stored in Tella.

homepage.protectData.item4.rest.message: change the look of Tella to hide it from people searching your phone.

homepage.protectData.item5.rest.message: choose one of the secure methods to share your files with other Tella vault or to a server.

homepage.collectEvidence.item1.rest.message: take photos, record videos and audio directly in Tella so that your files are immediately encrypted and hidden in the app.

homepage.collectEvidence.item2a.with.description: Platform names below (Uwazi, Open Data Kit, Tella Web, Google Drive, Dropbox, Nextcloud) are proper nouns and are not translated.

homepage.collectEvidence.item2b.after.message: that best suits your needs and share data directly from Tella.

homepage.collectEvidence.item3a.rest.message: in areas with limited or no internet connection, you can save your data and submit it when you reach a reliable internet connection.

homepage.openSource.item1.rest.message: Tella is designed for those whose safety is at risk. It is free to download and use, and will remain free forever.

homepage.openSource.item3a.before.message: The code for Tella is open-source and

homepage.openSource.item3a.after.message: so that researchers, security analysts, and developers can freely audit and reuse it.

homepage.openSource.item3b.before.description: Newest content, not yet translated in most locales.

homepage.openSource.item3b.after.message: that independent firms have performed on Tella.

goFurther.contactUs.description.message: Reach out for support or inquiries.
